title: The Duel Turns Desperate
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on the duel turns desperate, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Duel Turns Desperate. The crew enters Alubarna and splits into separate fights against Baroque Works’ strongest agents. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The rebels are almost here already.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Too bad, so sad! Better luck next time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And you! You're that pirate from before!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, zero! Go finish them off!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Heh heh. The rebellion ain't gonna start now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If I don't stop the rebels here, everything will have been in vain!

summary: This part develops the duel turns desperate and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
